zh.lifeSummary: 當Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan於1166年出生在法國布列塔尼莫比韓吉利爾斯時，他的父親Alain III de Rohan31歲，母親Constance dE PENTHIèVRE30歲。他和Mabile de Fougeres至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1205年10月27日在他的家鄉享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan于1166年出生在法国布列塔尼莫比韓吉利爾斯时，他的父亲Alain III de Rohan31岁，母亲Constance dE PENTHIèVRE30岁。他和Mabile de Fougeres至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1205年10月27日在他的家乡享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rohan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Brigid, Kieran, Oonagh, Padraig, Siobhan.
Irish (Kerry and Cork): from Ó Ruadhacháin or Ó Robhacháin, see Rowan .
Breton and English: habitational name from Rohan in Morbihan, Brittany (France).

variants.name: Rowan
meanings: Irish: from Ó Ruadháin or Ó Ruaidhín, both meaning ‘descendant of Ruadhán’, a personal name from a diminutive of ruadh ‘red’. See also Rooney .

Irish: from Ó Ruadhacháin, ‘son of Ruadhachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of ruadh ‘red’ (also used as a placename and Anglicized as Roughan). Compare also Rogan (Ó Ruadhagáin), of which may be a variant, both it and Ó Ruadhacháin being found in Ulster and Connacht.
Irish: from Ó Robhacháin, the name of a scattered ecclesiastical family, found in Clare in the 16th and 17th centuries. The personal name was earlier Reabhachán ‘skillful, artful’.

nameMeanings.name: Alain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Breton form of Alan, now common in all parts of France. See Alan .

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan was born in 1166, in Guilliers, Morbihan, Brittany, France, his father, Alain III de Rohan, was 31 and his mother, Constance dE PENTHIèVRE, was 30. He had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Mabile de Fougeres. He died on 27 October 1205, in his hometown, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan est né en 1166, à Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, son père, Alain III de Rohan, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Constance dE PENTHIèVRE, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Mabile de Fougeres. Il est décédé le 27 octobre 1205, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan 1166 in Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alain III de Rohan 31 und seine Mutter Constance dE PENTHIèVRE 30. Er hatte mit Mabile de Fougeres mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 27. Oktober 1205 im Alter von 39 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan è nato il nel 1166 nel Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Alain III de Rohan, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Constance dE PENTHIèVRE, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Mabile de Fougeres. Morì il 27 ottobre 1205, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohanが1166年にフランスブレタグンモービハングイリールズで生まれた時，父Alain III de Rohanは31歳，母Constance dE PENTHIèVREは30歳であった。彼はMabile de Fougeresとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1205年10月27日に故郷で39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan(이)가 1166년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 길리어스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alain III de Rohan(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance dE PENTHIèVRE(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Mabile de Fougeres(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1205년 10월 27일 그의 고향에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan nasceu em 1166, em Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Alain III de Rohan, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Constance dE PENTHIèVRE, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Mabile de Fougeres. Ele faleceu em 27 de outubro de 1205, em sua cidade natal, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan родился в 1166 г. в местности гуиллиирс, морбихань, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Alain III de Rohan было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Constance dE PENTHIèVRE, 30. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Mabile de Fougeres. Он умер 27 октября 1205 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 39 лет.

sm.from 1168 to 1195: mai le 1168 e o'o I le 1195

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan nació en 1166, en Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Alain III de Rohan, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Constance dE PENTHIèVRE, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Mabile de Fougeres. Murió el 27 de octubre de 1205, en su pueblo, a la edad de 39 años.
